leftObject.title: Left Object API Name
leftObject.description: The API name of the left object from the PREVIOUS "Run SOD Analysis" call. Do NOT ask the user for this — reuse the exact value returned by the analysis action. This ensures the CSV matches the analysis the user saw.

leftPermissions.title: Left Permissions
leftPermissions.description: The permissions used on the left object in the previous analysis. Reuse the exact value from the analysis output. If blank in analysis, leave blank here.

rightObject.title: Right Object API Name
rightObject.description: The API name of the right object from the PREVIOUS "Run SOD Analysis" call. Do NOT ask the user for this — reuse the exact value returned by the analysis action

rightPermissions.title: Right Permissions
rightPermissions.description: The permissions used on the right object in the previous analysis. Reuse the exact value from the analysis output.
